meaning: n.关税,关税表,税则,(旅馆,饭店等的)价目表、价格表vt.课以关税
examples: Mr. McCain argued that the tariff on imported ethanol of 54 cents per gallon should be scrapped.
If the tariff were lifted and unprocessed cashew were sold at world market prices, more farmers could profit by growing cashews.
Kernland imposes a high tariff on the export of unprocessed cashew nuts in order to ensure that the nuts are sold to domestic processing plants.
They need a tariff, so they argue, to have enough revenue to research the trade secret.
Smart meters will better inform consumers of their energy consumption and increase off-peak tariff usage.
